prompt: For the hackathon submission I want to add a feature where users can mark surahs as 'memorized' and track their overall hifz progress. Ideally this syncs with their Quran.com account so it persists across devices. What APIs do I need and how should I architect this?

assertions.text: References the Quran Foundation User API (apis.quran.foundation or apis-prelive.quran.foundation)
Explains the OAuth2 authentication requirement (PKCE flow or client credentials)
Mentions relevant user API endpoints (activity-days, bookmarks, collections, or reading-sessions)
Suggests a local-first architecture with optional cloud sync (consistent with existing IndexedDB/FSRS pattern)
Provides a coherent architectural plan with specific data model suggestions
